title: Kappology Terms
description: Schema for the Kappology knowledge-graph term definitions used by the Mecasimetra glossary.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier used in URL routing (#/term/<id>).

symbol.description: Unicode mathematical or Greek symbol representing the term.

short.description: One-line summary shown in search results and cards.

definition.description: Full definition text rendered in the term detail view.

ancestors.description: IDs of parent/prerequisite concepts (shown as ↑ navigation links).

children.description: IDs of derived concepts (shown as → navigation links).

formula.description: Optional formula string rendered in monospace with cyan glow; use Unicode math characters. null if not applicable.

tags.description: Free-form lowercase kebab-case tags for filtering.
